title: narcissus poeticus proles radiiflorus
intro: Narcissus poeticus proles radiiflorus, also known as the 'Flore Pleno' or 'Double Poet's Narcissus', is a specific variety of the Narcissus poeticus, a type of daffodil plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as galantamine. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus proles radiiflorus are said to include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and fatigue, as well as improvement in cognitive function and memory. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried flower extracts, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or capsules, although proper dosing and consultation with a healthcare professional are essential due to potential side effects.
